sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114380" key="xondroptisa/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χονδρο-πτῐσάνη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114380.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gruel of groats</tr_> as a drink for sick persons, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:1:72" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.72</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
